name: ExtensionMedicationKnowledge_Definitional_DrugCharacteristic_Value
title: R5: value additional types
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationKnowledge.definitional.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationKnowledge.definitional.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, base64Binary, CodeableConcept, Quantity[http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SimpleQuantity], string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationKnowledge.definitional.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` 0..1 `Attachment, base64Binary, CodeableConcept, Quantity[http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SimpleQuantity], string`
*  R4B: `MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` 0..1 `base64Binary, CodeableConcept, Quantity[http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SimpleQuantity], string`
*  R4: `MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` 0..1 `base64Binary, CodeableConcept, Quantity[http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SimpleQuantity], string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.definitional.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicationKnowledge.definitional.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` do not cover the following types: Attachment.
The target context `MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic`.

element.comment:

The description should be provided as a CodeableConcept, SimpleQuantity or an image.  The description can be a string only when these others are not available.
